summary: Frontend-only testing of Universal JSON Editor. All 9 requested scenarios PASSED: app loads, preset URLs from /url.json appear, Priser preset loads (5 categories, 3 items in first), Next/Prev navigation works, cross-category edit persistence confirmed A→B→A AND B preserved on round-trip, export preserves 'studenttilbud' wrapper key AND edits across 3 different categories, New JSON flat flow creates correct 'Alle' group with defined fields, New JSON nested flow creates 2 categories with working navigation, TextEditModal save propagates to table.

issues: Long text cells can overflow/clip (e.g. 'Allmenn tannbehand', 'Tannkjøttsbehandling') — horizontal scroll exists but a tooltip/wider column for short text would help UX; non-blocking

critical_code_review_comments: App.js is ~820 lines and mixes load/file/export/modal/render concerns — consider splitting into hooks (useJsonLoader, useCategoryNav) and presentational components per the >700-line guideline.
handleLoadJSON and handleFileUpload duplicate ~60 lines of JSON-structure detection logic — extract to a shared parseJsonStructure(data) helper (DRY).

Nested-structure detection relies on hardcoded keys `kategori` and (`pakker`|`tjenester`) at line 181/269 — will silently fall back to flat mode for any other nested shape. Consider a more generic detector or let user override via NewJsonModal's mainKey/itemsKey config for loaded files too.

Export filename uses `${mainKey}_edited.json` (e.g. 'prisliste_edited.json') — the wrapper 'studenttilbud' is preserved in content, but the filename drops context; consider using a user-supplied filename or original URL-derived name.
Users can delete all rows in a category; handleAddPackage dereferences packages[0] (line 313) and will throw when packages is empty — add a guard.
Field-type inference uses `value.length > 50` for longtext — numeric fields that happen to be strings get reclassified; fine for current data but brittle.
alert() is used for user feedback in export flows; consider a non-blocking toast for better UX consistency with the modernized theme.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure static React app (no backend) served at port 3000 via preview URL. Use URL.createObjectURL override trick to capture downloaded JSON blob. window.confirm/alert dialogs must be auto-accepted via page.on('dialog'). data-testid coverage is comprehensive. Priser preset categories: Undersøkelse og kontroll / Forebyggende / Fyllinger / Protetikk / Bleking. Wrapper key 'studenttilbud' sits alongside 'prisliste' array in priser.json — verified to survive full round-trip through edit+export.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no defects reproduced; all recently-fixed items (presetUrls state, new JSON modal, cross-category persistence, export wrapper preservation) verified working.
